highlights.text: I provided this setup way back on Friday June 20th at 4pm, when we were 6020, by stating: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend, until it ends.
My lean is we work back up to 6050, then 6081.
I was looking higher from there, and I wrote last Wednesday, “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
I wrote Friday at 4pm: “My lean is, as always, to defer to the trend.
I hunt this pattern everyday, and its called the Failed Breakdown.
We got long at this point (and the setup was provided to readers both in advance, and in real time).
5978-82 to 6081= a range (descending triangle) with 6050 a key magnet inside.

post_title: 6 Green Days In A Row For SPX. Can July 4th Bullish Seasonals Keep It Going? July 1st Plan
